title: Hash-based collections with known capacity should be initialized with the proper related static method
description: When the capacity of a hash-based collection (such as HashMap or HashSet) is known in advance, it should be initialized using the appropriate static method or constructor to avoid unnecessary resizing and improve performance.
recommendation: Use the static factory or constructor that allows specifying the initial capacity for hash-based collections when the required size is known.
impact: Failure to initialize hash-based collections with the correct capacity can lead to performance degradation due to repeated resizing and rehashing as elements are added.

checks.message: Use the static factory or constructor that allows specifying the initial capacity for hash-based collections when the required size is known.

original_logic_description: Detects hash-based collections (e.g., HashMap, HashSet) that are initialized without specifying an initial capacity when the required size is known or can be inferred.
